overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked neon-lit downtown district. The player character walks along wet sidewalks past crowds with umbrellas, under holographic billboards, and through an urban canyon of glass towers with heavy rain and reflective surfaces.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk downtown street with towering neon advertisements

events.description: camera pans down from looking up at skyscraper to street level
begins walking forward along the rainy sidewalk

agents.ego_description: standing still looking up at the neon tower, then panning down and beginning to walk through the crowded rainy street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking in same direction through the rain

entered.detail: tall building covered in holographic advertisements and glowing neon signs
rain-soaked concrete pavement reflecting colorful neon lights
concrete construction barriers separating the sidewalk from the street
ground floor commercial facades with illuminated signage and entryways

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a view looking up at a massive neon-covered skyscraper in heavy rain. The camera pans down to street level and begins walking forward along a wet sidewalk. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk through the rain, and concrete barriers line the right side of the path. The street is lined with illuminated shop fronts and towering digital advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under overhead billboard structure

events.description: enters covered area under large overhead billboard structure
emerges from under overpass back into open rain and neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the overpass with other pedestrians carrying umbrellas

notable_agents.action: car driving past on the wet street with headlights on

entered.detail: large metal framework with multiple digital screens hanging over the street
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road
illuminated advertising displays mounted on the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks under a massive overhead structure covered in digital billboards, providing shelter from the rain. The lighting shifts to a mix of neon and artificial overhead lights. Pedestrians continue walking in the same direction, and a car passes on the street to the right. The concrete barriers remain along the sidewalk edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street with large vertical advertisement walls

events.description: passing large illuminated billboard wall on left side with advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking past large digital billboards while rain continues to fall, with fewer pedestrians around

entered.detail: massive illuminated advertising screens showing various cyberpunk brand advertisements
tall palm tree lining the sidewalk against the dark sky
street corner with crosswalk and traffic signals visible ahead

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered area, the character walks along an open street with a large wall of vertical digital billboards on the left. Palm trees are visible in the distance, and the crowd thins out. The concrete barriers continue along the right side but appear further away as the street widens slightly. A street corner with traffic signals approaches in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with food vendor and crosswalk

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection crosswalk
turns slightly left to continue down new street segment past food cart

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the corner and continuing down the sidewalk past a street food vendor

notable_agents.action: food vendor standing at illuminated cart under umbrella

entered.detail: street food vendor cart with umbrella and illuminated menu board
modern skyscraper with blue illuminated windows rising above the street
stacked concrete barriers and construction materials along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the street corner and crosses the intersection at the crosswalk. A food vendor cart with an umbrella is visible on the left side of the street. After crossing, the character continues down a new street segment with construction concrete blocks lining the right side and a tall glass building with blue lights visible ahead. The rain continues to fall on the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked neon metropolis, moving from the shadow of a massive skyscraper toward a wide, illuminated intersection. It begins by panning down from a towering neon-covered building to a wet sidewalk where pedestrians with umbrellas navigate past illuminated shop fronts and concrete barriers. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts under a massive overhead structure of digital billboards that provides temporary shelter and alters the lighting to a mix of artificial overhead glows. The view then opens back into the rain along a widening street lined with vertical digital displays and distant palm trees before approaching a busy street corner. Finally, the camera crosses the intersection past a food vendor cart and continues down a new street segment toward a tall glass building glowing with blue lights.
